_meta.tool: get_trade_call (+ get_trade_signal alias — same producer getTradeSignal)
_meta.transport: MCP Streamable-HTTP POST https://api.algovault.com/mcp (tools/call) + stdio + x402 paid route
_meta.purpose: Public-response-shape SoT after the Data-Integrity correction of indicators.oi_change_pct. Supersedes get-trade-call-shape-snapshot-2026-06-22.json. CH1 proved the field was priceChange×100 — a 24h PRICE change mislabeled as OI (BTC live: '+1.4% bullish' while real OI fell −1.0%). It now reads the REAL OI delta (computeOiDelta over the oi_snapshots store — the SAME source the scan oi_change lens reads, single-derivation). NO field removed/renamed; the verdict (call/confidence) is BYTE-IDENTICAL (the internal oiScore is unchanged).

indicators_change.oi_change_pct: SEMANTICS CHANGED + now OPTIONAL. Was `number` (always present, priceChange×100 — a price proxy). NOW `number?` = the REAL OI % delta over oi_change_window (computeOiDelta over oi_snapshots). OMITTED (key absent) while the store is warming (< 2 snapshots spanning the window) OR on a store error (fail-soft) — never the old proxy, never a wrong sign (omission beats a wrong value).
indicators_change.oi_change_window: NEW additive `string?` (e.g. '24h'). Present IFF oi_change_pct is present (they are a pair).
indicators_change._receipts.factors[oi_change_pct]: AUTO-CORRECTS via the source: the receipts 'oi_change_pct' factor (bullish/bearish on |Δ|≥0.5%) now reflects the REAL OI delta; SKIPPED entirely while oi_change_pct is omitted (warming).
indicators_change.verdict_unchanged: call + confidence + regime are BYTE-IDENTICAL — the internal oiScore (get-trade-call.ts:307-310, also priceChange-derived) is verdict SCORING and is intentionally UNCHANGED this wave (changing it would change verdicts; flagged as a separate verdict-quant follow-up).

indicators_conditional.oi_change_pct: present iff the oi_snapshots store is warm for (coin, exchange)
indicators_conditional.funding_note: present iff TradFi/pre-IPO funding annotation applies

additive_and_correction_rule: oi_change_pct keeps its NAME (always meant 'OI change %') but its SOURCE is corrected to a real OI delta; it becomes OPTIONAL (omitted while warming). oi_change_window is additive. No other field removed/renamed; content[0] stays the JSON envelope. Showing the old priceChange×100 in oi_change_pct, or a value while warming, = Factuality/Data-Integrity violation → HALT.
drift_check_command: cd ~/code/crypto-quant-signal-mcp && npx vitest run trade-call-tradfi-hardening receipts   # indicators allow-list (oi_change_pct/window conditional pair), real-OI present-case, warming-omit, no outcome_*
consumers: MCP agent callers (Claude/Cursor/ChatGPT) via tools/call — read indicators.oi_change_pct + the _receipts factor
algovault-bot (Telegram) — parses content[0] JSON (tolerant of an omitted oi_change_pct)
src/lib/receipts.ts (formatReceipts — the oi_change_pct factor, auto-skips when omitted)
src/lib/oi-snapshots.ts (computeOiDelta — the single OI-delta source shared with the scan oi_change lens)
